name: Crypto Market Briefing
description: Get a daily briefing on crypto market conditions

agents.name: Crypto Scanner
agents.purpose: Scan crypto market data and news
agents.system_prompt_hint: Fetch current prices for top 10 cryptocurrencies. Check for major news, regulatory updates, and market-moving events. Note any significant price movements (>5%).

agents.name: Market Briefer
agents.purpose: Write a concise crypto market briefing
agents.system_prompt_hint: Write a concise crypto market briefing. Include: market overview, top movers, key news, and sentiment analysis. Keep it factual and balanced.

suggestion_card.title: Crypto Briefing
suggestion_card.subtitle: Daily crypto market overview
suggestion_card.prompt_template: Give me today's crypto market briefing

author: agentfactory
